The PopHIVE statistical outputs are research tools intended for use in the fields of public health and medicine. They are not intended for clinical decision making, are not intended to be used in the diagnosis or treatment of patients and may not be useful or appropriate for any clinical purpose. author: danweinberger <daniel.weinberger@yale.edu>

message: fixes issues with WashPost county encoding that was breaking ingestion

medicaid_fum_ch_7d_rate.short_name: FUM: Follow-up After ED Visit for Mental Illness (Child, 7-Day)
medicaid_fum_ch_7d_rate.long_name: Follow-up After Emergency Department Visit for Mental Illness – Children, Within 7 Days
medicaid_fum_ch_7d_rate.short_description: Percent of children with a follow-up visit within 7 days after an ED visit for mental illness under Medicaid/CHIP.
medicaid_fum_ch_7d_rate.long_description: Child Core Set measure (FUM). Percentage of children aged 6–17 with an ED visit for mental illness who had a follow-up visit with a mental health provider within 7 days of discharge. Higher rates indicate better performance. Associated columns: medicaid_fum_ch_7d_rate (state rate), medicaid_fum_ch_7d_pct_25 (25th-percentile benchmark), medicaid_fum_ch_7d_pct_75 (75th-percentile benchmark).
medicaid_fum_ch_7d_rate.statement: In {location}, {value}% of children had follow-up within 7 days after an ED visit for mental illness

citations.title: Medicaid and CHIP Core Set Quality Measures

medicaid_fum_ch_30d_rate.short_name: FUM: Follow-up After ED Visit for Mental Illness (Child, 30-Day)
medicaid_fum_ch_30d_rate.long_name: Follow-up After Emergency Department Visit for Mental Illness – Children, Within 30 Days
medicaid_fum_ch_30d_rate.short_description: Percent of children with a follow-up visit within 30 days after an ED visit for mental illness under Medicaid/CHIP.
medicaid_fum_ch_30d_rate.long_description: Child Core Set measure (FUM). Percentage of children aged 6–17 with an ED visit for mental illness who had a follow-up visit with a mental health provider within 30 days of discharge. Associated columns: medicaid_fum_ch_30d_rate, medicaid_fum_ch_30d_pct_25, medicaid_fum_ch_30d_pct_75.
medicaid_fum_ch_30d_rate.statement: In {location}, {value}% of children had follow-up within 30 days after an ED visit for mental illness

medicaid_fua_ch_7d_rate.short_name: FUA: Follow-up After ED Visit for Alcohol/Drug Abuse (Child, 7-Day)
medicaid_fua_ch_7d_rate.long_name: Follow-up After Emergency Department Visit for Alcohol and Other Drug Abuse – Children, Within 7 Days
medicaid_fua_ch_7d_rate.short_description: Percent of children with a follow-up visit within 7 days after an ED visit for alcohol or other drug abuse.
medicaid_fua_ch_7d_rate.long_description: Child Core Set measure (FUA). Percentage of children with an ED visit for alcohol or other drug abuse who received follow-up care within 7 days. Associated columns: medicaid_fua_ch_7d_rate, medicaid_fua_ch_7d_pct_25, medicaid_fua_ch_7d_pct_75.
medicaid_fua_ch_7d_rate.statement: In {location}, {value}% of children had follow-up within 7 days after an ED visit for alcohol or drug abuse

medicaid_fua_ch_30d_rate.short_name: FUA: Follow-up After ED Visit for Alcohol/Drug Abuse (Child, 30-Day)
medicaid_fua_ch_30d_rate.long_name: Follow-up After Emergency Department Visit for Alcohol and Other Drug Abuse – Children, Within 30 Days
medicaid_fua_ch_30d_rate.short_description: Percent of children with a follow-up visit within 30 days after an ED visit for alcohol or other drug abuse.
medicaid_fua_ch_30d_rate.long_description: Child Core Set measure (FUA). Percentage of children with an ED visit for alcohol or other drug abuse who received follow-up care within 30 days. Associated columns: medicaid_fua_ch_30d_rate, medicaid_fua_ch_30d_pct_25, medicaid_fua_ch_30d_pct_75.
medicaid_fua_ch_30d_rate.statement: In {location}, {value}% of children had follow-up within 30 days after an ED visit for alcohol or drug abuse

medicaid_fuh_ch_7d_rate.short_name: FUH: Follow-up After Hospitalization for Mental Illness (Child, 7-Day)
medicaid_fuh_ch_7d_rate.long_name: Follow-up After Hospitalization for Mental Illness – Children, Within 7 Days
medicaid_fuh_ch_7d_rate.short_description: Percent of children with a follow-up visit within 7 days after hospitalization for mental illness.
medicaid_fuh_ch_7d_rate.long_description: Child Core Set measure (FUH). Percentage of children aged 6–17 discharged from an acute inpatient setting for mental illness who had a follow-up visit within 7 days. Associated columns: medicaid_fuh_ch_7d_rate, medicaid_fuh_ch_7d_pct_25, medicaid_fuh_ch_7d_pct_75.
medicaid_fuh_ch_7d_rate.statement: In {location}, {value}% of children had follow-up within 7 days after hospitalization for mental illness

medicaid_fuh_ch_30d_rate.short_name: FUH: Follow-up After Hospitalization for Mental Illness (Child, 30-Day)
medicaid_fuh_ch_30d_rate.long_name: Follow-up After Hospitalization for Mental Illness – Children, Within 30 Days
medicaid_fuh_ch_30d_rate.short_description: Percent of children with a follow-up visit within 30 days after hospitalization for mental illness.
medicaid_fuh_ch_30d_rate.long_description: Child Core Set measure (FUH). Percentage of children aged 6–17 discharged from an acute inpatient setting for mental illness who had a follow-up visit within 30 days. Associated columns: medicaid_fuh_ch_30d_rate, medicaid_fuh_ch_30d_pct_25, medicaid_fuh_ch_30d_pct_75.
medicaid_fuh_ch_30d_rate.statement: In {location}, {value}% of children had follow-up within 30 days after hospitalization for mental illness

medicaid_add_ch_init_rate.long_name: Follow-up Care for Children Prescribed ADHD Medication – Initiation Phase
medicaid_add_ch_init_rate.short_description: Percent of children newly prescribed ADHD medication who had at least one follow-up visit during the initiation phase.
medicaid_add_ch_init_rate.long_description: Child Core Set measure (ADD). Initiation phase: percentage of children aged 6–12 newly prescribed ADHD medication who had at least one follow-up visit with a prescriber within 30 days. Associated columns: medicaid_add_ch_init_rate, medicaid_add_ch_init_pct_25, medicaid_add_ch_init_pct_75.
medicaid_add_ch_init_rate.statement: In {location}, {value}% of children newly prescribed ADHD medication had a follow-up visit during the initiation phase

medicaid_add_ch_30d_rate.long_name: Follow-up Care for Children Prescribed ADHD Medication – 30-Day Follow-up
medicaid_add_ch_30d_rate.short_description: Percent of children prescribed ADHD medication with a follow-up visit within 30 days.
medicaid_add_ch_30d_rate.long_description: Child Core Set measure (ADD). 30-day follow-up phase component. Associated columns: medicaid_add_ch_30d_rate, medicaid_add_ch_30d_pct_25, medicaid_add_ch_30d_pct_75.
medicaid_add_ch_30d_rate.statement: In {location}, {value}% of children prescribed ADHD medication had a follow-up visit within 30 days

medicaid_add_ch_cont_rate.long_name: Follow-up Care for Children Prescribed ADHD Medication – Continuation and Maintenance Phase
medicaid_add_ch_cont_rate.short_description: Percent of children on ADHD medication with follow-up visits during the continuation and maintenance phase.
medicaid_add_ch_cont_rate.long_description: Child Core Set measure (ADD). Continuation and maintenance phase: percentage of children who remained on ADHD medication for at least 210 days and had at least two follow-up visits within the 9-month continuation period. Associated columns: medicaid_add_ch_cont_rate, medicaid_add_ch_cont_pct_25, medicaid_add_ch_cont_pct_75.
medicaid_add_ch_cont_rate.statement: In {location}, {value}% of children on ADHD medication had appropriate follow-up during the continuation phase

medicaid_apm_ch_gluc_rate.short_name: APM: Metabolic Monitoring on Antipsychotics – Blood Glucose (Child)
medicaid_apm_ch_gluc_rate.long_name: Metabolic Monitoring for Children and Adolescents on Antipsychotics – Blood Glucose
medicaid_apm_ch_gluc_rate.short_description: Percent of children on antipsychotics who received blood glucose monitoring.
medicaid_apm_ch_gluc_rate.long_description: Child Core Set measure (APM). Percentage of children and adolescents aged 1–17 who had two or more antipsychotic prescriptions and received a blood glucose test. Associated columns: medicaid_apm_ch_gluc_rate, medicaid_apm_ch_gluc_pct_25, medicaid_apm_ch_gluc_pct_75.
medicaid_apm_ch_gluc_rate.statement: In {location}, {value}% of children on antipsychotics received blood glucose monitoring

medicaid_apm_ch_chol_rate.short_name: APM: Metabolic Monitoring on Antipsychotics – Cholesterol (Child)
medicaid_apm_ch_chol_rate.long_name: Metabolic Monitoring for Children and Adolescents on Antipsychotics – Cholesterol
medicaid_apm_ch_chol_rate.short_description: Percent of children on antipsychotics who received cholesterol monitoring.
medicaid_apm_ch_chol_rate.long_description: Child Core Set measure (APM). Percentage of children and adolescents aged 1–17 on antipsychotic medication who received a cholesterol test. Associated columns: medicaid_apm_ch_chol_rate, medicaid_apm_ch_chol_pct_25, medicaid_apm_ch_chol_pct_75.
medicaid_apm_ch_chol_rate.statement: In {location}, {value}% of children on antipsychotics received cholesterol monitoring

medicaid_apm_ch_gluc_chol_rate.short_name: APM: Metabolic Monitoring on Antipsychotics – Blood Glucose and Cholesterol (Child)
medicaid_apm_ch_gluc_chol_rate.long_name: Metabolic Monitoring for Children and Adolescents on Antipsychotics – Blood Glucose and Cholesterol
medicaid_apm_ch_gluc_chol_rate.short_description: Percent of children on antipsychotics who received both blood glucose and cholesterol monitoring.
medicaid_apm_ch_gluc_chol_rate.long_description: Child Core Set measure (APM). Percentage of children and adolescents aged 1–17 on antipsychotics who received both a blood glucose test and a cholesterol test. Associated columns: medicaid_apm_ch_gluc_chol_rate, medicaid_apm_ch_gluc_chol_pct_25, medicaid_apm_ch_gluc_chol_pct_75.
medicaid_apm_ch_gluc_chol_rate.statement: In {location}, {value}% of children on antipsychotics received both blood glucose and cholesterol monitoring

medicaid_app_ch_rate.short_name: APP: Use of First-Line Psychosocial Care for Youth on Antipsychotics (Child)
medicaid_app_ch_rate.long_name: Use of First-Line Psychosocial Care for Children and Adolescents on Antipsychotics
medicaid_app_ch_rate.short_description: Percent of children newly prescribed antipsychotics who received first-line psychosocial care.
medicaid_app_ch_rate.long_description: Child Core Set measure (APP). Percentage of children and adolescents aged 1–17 with a new antipsychotic prescription who had documentation of psychosocial care as first-line treatment. Associated columns: medicaid_app_ch_rate, medicaid_app_ch_pct_25, medicaid_app_ch_pct_75.
medicaid_app_ch_rate.statement: In {location}, {value}% of children newly prescribed antipsychotics received first-line psychosocial care

medicaid_amb_ch_rate.long_name: Ambulatory Care – Emergency Department Utilization, Children
medicaid_amb_ch_rate.short_description: Rate of emergency department visits among children per 1,000 member months.
medicaid_amb_ch_rate.long_description: Child Core Set measure (AMB). Rate of ED visits per 1,000 Medicaid/CHIP member months for children. Lower rates may indicate better access to primary care. Associated columns: medicaid_amb_ch_rate, medicaid_amb_ch_pct_25, medicaid_amb_ch_pct_75.
medicaid_amb_ch_rate.statement: In {location}, children had {value} ED visits per 1,000 member months

medicaid_amr_ch_rate.short_description: Percent of children with persistent asthma who had an appropriate ratio of controller to total asthma medications.
medicaid_amr_ch_rate.long_description: Child Core Set measure (AMR). Percentage of children aged 5–18 with persistent asthma who had a ratio of controller medications to total asthma medications of 0.50 or greater. Higher rates indicate better asthma management. Associated columns: medicaid_amr_ch_rate, medicaid_amr_ch_pct_25, medicaid_amr_ch_pct_75.
medicaid_amr_ch_rate.statement: In {location}, {value}% of children with persistent asthma had an appropriate medication ratio

medicaid_aab_ch_rate.short_name: AAB: Avoidance of Antibiotic Treatment for Acute Bronchitis (Child)
medicaid_aab_ch_rate.long_name: Avoidance of Antibiotic Treatment in Adults with Acute Bronchitis – Children
medicaid_aab_ch_rate.short_description: Percent of children with acute bronchitis who were not prescribed an antibiotic.
medicaid_aab_ch_rate.long_description: Child Core Set measure (AAB). Percentage of children aged 3 months–17 years with a diagnosis of acute bronchitis who were not dispensed an antibiotic prescription. Higher rates indicate more appropriate antibiotic stewardship. Associated columns: medicaid_aab_ch_rate, medicaid_aab_ch_pct_25, medicaid_aab_ch_pct_75.
medicaid_aab_ch_rate.statement: In {location}, {value}% of children with acute bronchitis avoided inappropriate antibiotic treatment

medicaid_wcc_ch_rate.short_name: WCC: Weight Assessment and Counseling for Children
medicaid_wcc_ch_rate.long_name: Weight Assessment and Counseling for Nutrition and Physical Activity for Children/Adolescents
medicaid_wcc_ch_rate.short_description: Percent of children with a BMI percentile, physical activity counseling, and nutrition counseling documented.
medicaid_wcc_ch_rate.long_description: Child Core Set measure (WCC). Percentage of children aged 3–17 who had an outpatient visit with a BMI percentile documented and received counseling for nutrition and physical activity. Associated columns: medicaid_wcc_ch_rate, medicaid_wcc_ch_pct_25, medicaid_wcc_ch_pct_75.
medicaid_wcc_ch_rate.statement: In {location}, {value}% of children received weight assessment and nutrition/physical activity counseling

medicaid_w30_ch_rate.short_name: W30: Well-Child Visits in the First 30 Months
medicaid_w30_ch_rate.long_name: Well-Child Visits in the First 30 Months of Life
medicaid_w30_ch_rate.short_description: Percent of children who had the recommended number of well-child visits in the first 30 months of life.
medicaid_w30_ch_rate.long_description: Child Core Set measure (W30). Percentage of children who turned 15 months or 30 months old and had the recommended number of well-child visits with a PCP. Associated columns: medicaid_w30_ch_rate, medicaid_w30_ch_pct_25, medicaid_w30_ch_pct_75.
medicaid_w30_ch_rate.statement: In {location}, {value}% of children had recommended well-child visits in the first 30 months

medicaid_w15_ch_rate.short_name: W15: Well-Child Visits in the First 15 Months
medicaid_w15_ch_rate.long_name: Well-Child Visits in the First 15 Months of Life
medicaid_w15_ch_rate.short_description: Percent of children who had the recommended number of well-child visits in the first 15 months of life.
medicaid_w15_ch_rate.long_description: Child Core Set measure (W15). Percentage of children who turned 15 months old and had six or more well-child visits with a PCP during the measurement year. Associated columns: medicaid_w15_ch_rate, medicaid_w15_ch_pct_25, medicaid_w15_ch_pct_75.
medicaid_w15_ch_rate.statement: In {location}, {value}% of children had recommended well-child visits in the first 15 months

medicaid_w34_ch_rate.long_name: Well-Child Visits for Children Ages 3 to 4
medicaid_w34_ch_rate.short_description: Percent of children ages 3–4 who had at least one well-child visit.
medicaid_w34_ch_rate.long_description: Child Core Set measure (W34). Percentage of children aged 3–4 who had at least one well-child visit with a PCP during the measurement year. Associated columns: medicaid_w34_ch_rate, medicaid_w34_ch_pct_25, medicaid_w34_ch_pct_75.
medicaid_w34_ch_rate.statement: In {location}, {value}% of children ages 3–4 had a well-child visit

medicaid_awc_ch_rate.short_description: Percent of adolescents who had at least one comprehensive well-care visit.
medicaid_awc_ch_rate.long_description: Child Core Set measure (AWC). Percentage of adolescents aged 12–21 who had at least one comprehensive well-care visit with a PCP or OB/GYN practitioner during the measurement year. Associated columns: medicaid_awc_ch_rate, medicaid_awc_ch_pct_25, medicaid_awc_ch_pct_75.
medicaid_awc_ch_rate.statement: In {location}, {value}% of adolescents had a comprehensive well-care visit

medicaid_wcv_ch_rate.short_name: WCV: Well-Child Visits in the First 30 Months (Alternate)
medicaid_wcv_ch_rate.long_name: Well-Child Visits in the First 30 Months of Life (WCV)
medicaid_wcv_ch_rate.short_description: Percent of children who had the recommended well-child visits in the first 30 months.
medicaid_wcv_ch_rate.long_description: Child Core Set measure (WCV). Tracks well-child visits for children in their first 30 months. Associated columns: medicaid_wcv_ch_rate, medicaid_wcv_ch_pct_25, medicaid_wcv_ch_pct_75.
medicaid_wcv_ch_rate.statement: In {location}, {value}% of children had recommended well-child visits in the first 30 months

medicaid_cap_ch_rate.short_name: CAP: Children's Access to Primary Care
medicaid_cap_ch_rate.long_name: Children and Adolescents' Access to Primary Care Practitioners
medicaid_cap_ch_rate.short_description: Percent of children who had a visit with a PCP during the measurement year.
medicaid_cap_ch_rate.long_description: Child Core Set measure (CAP). Percentage of children aged 12 months–19 years who had at least one visit with a primary care practitioner during the measurement year. Associated columns: medicaid_cap_ch_rate, medicaid_cap_ch_pct_25, medicaid_cap_ch_pct_75.
medicaid_cap_ch_rate.statement: In {location}, {value}% of children had access to a primary care practitioner

medicaid_dev_ch_rate.short_name: DEV: Developmental Screening in the First Three Years
medicaid_dev_ch_rate.long_name: Developmental Screening in the First Three Years of Life
medicaid_dev_ch_rate.short_description: Percent of children who were screened for developmental delays by age 3.
medicaid_dev_ch_rate.long_description: Child Core Set measure (DEV). Percentage of children who turned 1, 2, or 3 years old and had at least one standardized developmental screening using a validated screening instrument. Associated columns: medicaid_dev_ch_rate, medicaid_dev_ch_pct_25, medicaid_dev_ch_pct_75.
medicaid_dev_ch_rate.statement: In {location}, {value}% of young children were screened for developmental delays

medicaid_lsc_ch_rate.short_description: Percent of children who had a blood lead test before age 2.
medicaid_lsc_ch_rate.long_description: Child Core Set measure (LSC). Percentage of children aged 2 who had at least one blood lead test before their second birthday. Associated columns: medicaid_lsc_ch_rate, medicaid_lsc_ch_pct_25, medicaid_lsc_ch_pct_75.
medicaid_lsc_ch_rate.statement: In {location}, {value}% of children received lead screening before age 2

medicaid_apc_ch_rate.short_name: APC: Use of Opioids at High Dosage (Child)
medicaid_apc_ch_rate.long_name: Use of Opioids at High Dosage in Persons Without Cancer – Children
medicaid_apc_ch_rate.short_description: Percent of children receiving high-dosage opioid prescriptions without a cancer diagnosis.
medicaid_apc_ch_rate.long_description: Child Core Set measure (APC). Percentage of children and adolescents without cancer who received prescriptions for opioids with a high average daily dosage. Lower rates indicate safer prescribing. Associated columns: medicaid_apc_ch_rate, medicaid_apc_ch_pct_25, medicaid_apc_ch_pct_75.
medicaid_apc_ch_rate.statement: In {location}, {value}% of children without cancer received high-dosage opioids

medicaid_mma_ch_rate.long_name: Medication Management for People with Asthma – Children
medicaid_mma_ch_rate.short_description: Percent of children with asthma who were on long-term control medication for at least 75% of their treatment period.
medicaid_mma_ch_rate.long_description: Child Core Set measure (MMA). Percentage of children aged 5–18 with persistent asthma who were dispensed appropriate medications for at least 75% of their treatment period. Associated columns: medicaid_mma_ch_rate, medicaid_mma_ch_pct_25, medicaid_mma_ch_pct_75.
medicaid_mma_ch_rate.statement: In {location}, {value}% of children with asthma received appropriate long-term control medication

medicaid_oev_ch_rate.short_description: Percent of children who received a dental oral evaluation during the measurement year.
medicaid_oev_ch_rate.long_description: Child Core Set measure (OEV). Percentage of children aged 1–20 enrolled in Medicaid/CHIP who received at least one dental oral evaluation or comprehensive exam during the measurement year. Associated columns: medicaid_oev_ch_rate, medicaid_oev_ch_pct_25, medicaid_oev_ch_pct_75.
medicaid_oev_ch_rate.statement: In {location}, {value}% of children received a dental oral evaluation

medicaid_sfm_ch_rate.short_name: SFM: Sealant Receipt on Permanent First Molars (Child)
medicaid_sfm_ch_rate.long_name: Sealant Receipt on Permanent First Molars – Children
medicaid_sfm_ch_rate.short_description: Percent of children in a selected age range who received a sealant on a permanent first molar tooth.
medicaid_sfm_ch_rate.long_description: Child Core Set measure (SFM). Percentage of children aged 6–9 enrolled in Medicaid/CHIP who received a sealant on at least one permanent first molar tooth during the measurement year. Associated columns: medicaid_sfm_ch_rate, medicaid_sfm_ch_pct_25, medicaid_sfm_ch_pct_75.
medicaid_sfm_ch_rate.statement: In {location}, {value}% of children received a sealant on a permanent first molar

medicaid_tfl_ch_rate.short_name: TFL: Topical Fluoride for High-Risk Children
medicaid_tfl_ch_rate.long_name: Topical Fluoride for High-Risk Children Between the Ages of 1 and 20
medicaid_tfl_ch_rate.short_description: Percent of high-risk children who received a fluoride varnish or topical fluoride application.
medicaid_tfl_ch_rate.long_description: Child Core Set measure (TFL). Percentage of children aged 1–20 identified as high-risk for dental caries who received at least two topical fluoride applications during the measurement year. Associated columns: medicaid_tfl_ch_rate, medicaid_tfl_ch_pct_25, medicaid_tfl_ch_pct_75.
medicaid_tfl_ch_rate.statement: In {location}, {value}% of high-risk children received topical fluoride

medicaid_pdent_ch_rate.short_description: Percent of children who received at least one preventive dental service.
medicaid_pdent_ch_rate.long_description: Child Core Set measure (PDENT). Percentage of children aged 1–20 who received at least one preventive dental service (e.g., cleaning, fluoride, sealants) during the measurement year. Associated columns: medicaid_pdent_ch_rate, medicaid_pdent_ch_pct_25, medicaid_pdent_ch_pct_75.
medicaid_pdent_ch_rate.statement: In {location}, {value}% of children received preventive dental services

medicaid_seal_ch_rate.long_name: Sealant Receipt on Permanent Teeth – Children
medicaid_seal_ch_rate.short_description: Percent of children who received sealants on permanent teeth.
medicaid_seal_ch_rate.long_description: Child Core Set measure (SEAL). Percentage of children who received a dental sealant on at least one permanent tooth during the measurement year. Associated columns: medicaid_seal_ch_rate, medicaid_seal_ch_pct_25, medicaid_seal_ch_pct_75.
medicaid_seal_ch_rate.statement: In {location}, {value}% of children received a sealant on a permanent tooth

medicaid_tdent_ch_rate.short_description: Percent of children who received any dental service during the measurement year.
medicaid_tdent_ch_rate.long_description: Child Core Set measure (TDENT). Percentage of children aged 1–20 enrolled in Medicaid/CHIP who received any dental service during the measurement year. Associated columns: medicaid_tdent_ch_rate, medicaid_tdent_ch_pct_25, medicaid_tdent_ch_pct_75.
medicaid_tdent_ch_rate.statement: In {location}, {value}% of children received any dental service

medicaid_cpc_ch_rate.short_description: Percent of adolescent females with a live birth who received postpartum contraceptive care.
medicaid_cpc_ch_rate.long_description: Child Core Set measure (CPC). Percentage of adolescent females aged 15–20 who had a live birth and received a most or moderately effective contraceptive method within 60 days of delivery. Associated columns: medicaid_cpc_ch_rate, medicaid_cpc_ch_pct_25, medicaid_cpc_ch_pct_75.
medicaid_cpc_ch_rate.statement: In {location}, {value}% of adolescent females received postpartum contraceptive care

medicaid_lbw_ch_rate.long_name: Live Births Weighing Less Than 2,500 Grams – Children
medicaid_lbw_ch_rate.short_description: Percent of live births weighing less than 2,500 grams among Medicaid/CHIP deliveries.
medicaid_lbw_ch_rate.long_description: Child Core Set measure (LBW). Percentage of live singleton deliveries that resulted in a low birthweight infant (less than 2,500 grams). Lower rates indicate better outcomes. Associated columns: medicaid_lbw_ch_rate, medicaid_lbw_ch_pct_25, medicaid_lbw_ch_pct_75.
medicaid_lbw_ch_rate.statement: In {location}, {value}% of Medicaid/CHIP births resulted in low birthweight

medicaid_lrcd_ch_rate.short_name: LRCD: Live Births Weighing Less Than 2,500g (Child, Risk-Adjusted)
medicaid_lrcd_ch_rate.long_name: Live Births Weighing Less Than 2,500 Grams – Risk-Adjusted, Children
medicaid_lrcd_ch_rate.short_description: Risk-adjusted percent of live births weighing less than 2,500 grams among Medicaid/CHIP deliveries.
medicaid_lrcd_ch_rate.long_description: Child Core Set measure (LRCD). Risk-adjusted version of the low birthweight measure. Percentage of live singleton deliveries resulting in low birthweight, adjusted for clinical and demographic risk factors. Associated columns: medicaid_lrcd_ch_rate, medicaid_lrcd_ch_pct_25, medicaid_lrcd_ch_pct_75.
medicaid_lrcd_ch_rate.statement: In {location}, the risk-adjusted low birthweight rate was {value}%

medicaid_ppc_ch_rate.short_description: Percent of adolescent females who received timely prenatal and postpartum care.
medicaid_ppc_ch_rate.long_description: Child Core Set measure (PPC). Percentage of adolescent females aged 15–20 who had a live birth and received a prenatal care visit in the first trimester and a postpartum visit within 21–56 days of delivery. Associated columns: medicaid_ppc_ch_rate, medicaid_ppc_ch_pct_25, medicaid_ppc_ch_pct_75.
medicaid_ppc_ch_rate.statement: In {location}, {value}% of adolescent mothers received timely prenatal and postpartum care

medicaid_fpc_ch_rate.short_description: Percent of adolescent females who received a prenatal care visit in the first trimester.
medicaid_fpc_ch_rate.long_description: Child Core Set measure (FPC). Percentage of adolescent females aged 15–20 who had a live birth and received a prenatal care visit in the first trimester. Associated columns: medicaid_fpc_ch_rate, medicaid_fpc_ch_pct_25, medicaid_fpc_ch_pct_75.
medicaid_fpc_ch_rate.statement: In {location}, {value}% of adolescent mothers received first-trimester prenatal care

medicaid_ccw_ch_rate.short_description: Percent of children who received recommended vaccinations by age 2.
medicaid_ccw_ch_rate.long_description: Child Core Set measure (CCW). Percentage of children who turned 2 years old and received recommended vaccinations including DTaP, IPV, MMR, Hib, hepatitis B, VZV, PCV, and influenza vaccines. Associated columns: medicaid_ccw_ch_rate, medicaid_ccw_ch_pct_25, medicaid_ccw_ch_pct_75.
medicaid_ccw_ch_rate.statement: In {location}, {value}% of children received recommended childhood vaccinations by age 2

medicaid_cis_ch_rate.short_description: Percent of children who received all recommended vaccinations by age 2.
medicaid_cis_ch_rate.long_description: Child Core Set measure (CIS). Alternate childhood immunization status measure. Tracks the combination of recommended vaccines received by children by their second birthday. Associated columns: medicaid_cis_ch_rate, medicaid_cis_ch_pct_25, medicaid_cis_ch_pct_75.
medicaid_cis_ch_rate.statement: In {location}, {value}% of children completed the childhood immunization series

medicaid_ima_ch_rate.short_description: Percent of adolescents who received recommended vaccines including meningococcal, Tdap, and HPV.
medicaid_ima_ch_rate.long_description: Child Core Set measure (IMA). Percentage of adolescents aged 13 who received meningococcal, Tdap/Td booster, and HPV vaccines. Associated columns: medicaid_ima_ch_rate, medicaid_ima_ch_pct_25, medicaid_ima_ch_pct_75.
medicaid_ima_ch_rate.statement: In {location}, {value}% of adolescents received recommended immunizations

medicaid_hpv_ch_rate.short_description: Percent of adolescents who received the HPV vaccine series.
medicaid_hpv_ch_rate.long_description: Child Core Set measure (HPV). Percentage of adolescents aged 13 who received the full HPV vaccine series. Associated columns: medicaid_hpv_ch_rate, medicaid_hpv_ch_pct_25, medicaid_hpv_ch_pct_75.
medicaid_hpv_ch_rate.statement: In {location}, {value}% of adolescents received the HPV vaccine series

medicaid_ccp_ch_rate.short_description: Percent of adolescent females who received a most effective or moderately effective contraceptive method.
medicaid_ccp_ch_rate.long_description: Child Core Set measure (CCP). Percentage of adolescent females aged 15–20 who received a most effective or moderately effective contraceptive method. Associated columns: medicaid_ccp_ch_rate, medicaid_ccp_ch_pct_25, medicaid_ccp_ch_pct_75.
medicaid_ccp_ch_rate.statement: In {location}, {value}% of adolescent females received effective contraceptive care

medicaid_chl_ch_rate.statement: In {location}, {value}% of adolescent females were screened for chlamydia

Percentage of adults aged 18 and older diagnosed with a new episode of major depression who remained on antidepressant medication during the acute treatment phase. medicaid_aab_ad_rate.statement: In {location}, {value}% of adults with acute bronchitis avoided inappropriate antibiotic treatment

medicaid_cbp_ad_rate.statement: In {location}, {value}% of adults with hypertension had adequately controlled blood pressure

medicaid_ncidds_ad_rate.statement: In {location}, {value}% of adolescent females received non-recommended cervical cancer screening

medicaid_fva_ad_rate.long_name: Flu Vaccinations for Adults in Medicaid
medicaid_fva_ad_rate.short_description: Percent of adults who received an influenza vaccination during the flu season.
medicaid_fva_ad_rate.long_description: Adult Core Set measure (FVA). Percentage of adults aged 18–64 who received an influenza vaccination during the measurement year's flu season (August 1 – March 31). Associated columns: medicaid_fva_ad_rate, medicaid_fva_ad_pct_25, medicaid_fva_ad_pct_75.
medicaid_fva_ad_rate.statement: In {location}, {value}% of adults received an influenza vaccination

medicaid_pcr_ad_rate.short_description: Rate of all-cause 30-day readmissions following an acute inpatient stay.
medicaid_pcr_ad_rate.long_description: Adult Core Set measure (PCR). Ratio of observed to expected 30-day all-cause readmissions following an acute inpatient discharge among adults aged 18 and older. Lower values indicate fewer potentially preventable readmissions. Associated columns: medicaid_pcr_ad_rate, medicaid_pcr_ad_pct_25, medicaid_pcr_ad_pct_75.
medicaid_pcr_ad_rate.statement: In {location}, the all-cause readmission ratio was {value}

medicaid_hpc_ad_rate.short_name: HPC: Use of Opioids at High Dosage (Adult)
medicaid_hpc_ad_rate.long_name: Use of Opioids at High Dosage in Persons Without Cancer – Adults (HPC)
medicaid_hpc_ad_rate.short_description: Percent of adults without cancer who received opioid prescriptions at high dosage.
medicaid_hpc_ad_rate.long_description: Adult Core Set measure (HPC). Percentage of adults without a cancer diagnosis who received prescription opioids at a high average daily dosage. Lower rates indicate safer opioid prescribing practices. Associated columns: medicaid_hpc_ad_rate, medicaid_hpc_ad_pct_25, medicaid_hpc_ad_pct_75.
medicaid_hpc_ad_rate.statement: In {location}, {value}% of adults without cancer received high-dosage opioid prescriptions

medicaid_ohd_ad_rate.short_description: Percent of adults who received at least one dental service during the measurement year.
medicaid_ohd_ad_rate.long_description: Adult Core Set measure (OHD). Percentage of adults aged 18–64 enrolled in Medicaid who received at least one dental service during the measurement year. Associated columns: medicaid_ohd_ad_rate, medicaid_ohd_ad_pct_25, medicaid_ohd_ad_pct_75.
medicaid_ohd_ad_rate.statement: In {location}, {value}% of adult Medicaid enrollees received dental services

medicaid_cpa_ad_rate.short_description: Percent of adult women with a live birth who received postpartum contraceptive care.
medicaid_cpa_ad_rate.long_description: Adult Core Set measure (CPA). Percentage of women aged 21–44 who had a live birth and received a most or moderately effective contraceptive method within 60 days of delivery. Associated columns: medicaid_cpa_ad_rate, medicaid_cpa_ad_pct_25, medicaid_cpa_ad_pct_75.
medicaid_cpa_ad_rate.statement: In {location}, {value}% of adult women received postpartum contraceptive care

medicaid_ppc_ad_rate.short_description: Percent of adult women who received timely prenatal and postpartum care.
medicaid_ppc_ad_rate.long_description: Adult Core Set measure (PPC). Percentage of women aged 21–44 who had a live birth and received a prenatal care visit in the first trimester and a postpartum visit within 21–56 days of delivery. Associated columns: medicaid_ppc_ad_rate, medicaid_ppc_ad_pct_25, medicaid_ppc_ad_pct_75.
medicaid_ppc_ad_rate.statement: In {location}, {value}% of adult women received timely prenatal and postpartum care

medicaid_chl_ad_rate.short_description: Percent of sexually active adult women screened for chlamydia.
medicaid_chl_ad_rate.long_description: Adult Core Set measure (CHL). Percentage of sexually active women aged 21–24 who were screened for chlamydia during the measurement year. Associated columns: medicaid_chl_ad_rate, medicaid_chl_ad_pct_25, medicaid_chl_ad_pct_75.
medicaid_chl_ad_rate.statement: In {location}, {value}% of adult women were screened for chlamydia

medicaid_quality_cms.name: Medicaid and CHIP Adult and Child Core Set Quality Measures
medicaid_quality_cms.location: Medicaid.gov Open Data – Quality Measures datasets (2014–2023)
medicaid_quality_cms.description: Annual state-level performance data on the Medicaid and CHIP Adult Core Set and Child Core Set quality measures, as voluntarily reported by states to CMS and analyzed by Mathematica via the Quality Measure Reporting (QMR) system. Measures span behavioral health (e.g., follow-up after ED visits for mental illness, substance use disorder treatment), primary and preventive care (e.g., well-child visits, immunizations), maternal and perinatal health (e.g., prenatal and postpartum care, low birthweight), dental health, care of chronic conditions (e.g., diabetes, asthma, hypertension), and long-term services and supports. Each annual dataset includes state rates and national 25th and 75th percentile benchmarks. Data cover federal fiscal years 2014–2023. Reporting is voluntary; not all states report all measures each year. The wide-format standard file contains one row per state-year-payer-domain combination, with each measure-statistic combination as a separate column following the naming convention medicaid_{measure_abbr}_{population}_{sub_metric}_{stat} where population is 'ch' (child) or 'ad' (adult), sub_metric captures time windows or sub-components, and stat is 'rate', 'pct_25', or 'pct_75'.
medicaid_quality_cms.restrictions: Public domain. CMS/Medicaid.gov data is generally not subject to copyright restrictions.
